dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 6% more damage to enemies that are facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Fiend Hunter
dbEquipBonuses.description: +1% Damage against Demons, Devils, and Fiends

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Awareness
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1500 Awareness for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Charged Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Critical Severity is increased by 5000.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Action
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Action Point Gain is increased by 7.5%. When your health is below 50%, Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Retaliatory Shockwave
dbEquipBonuses.description: On hit > 15% MaxHP: 60 mag shockwave + 3.5% Awareness 7s (12s cd)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Strike
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Control Bonus when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain -1% Incoming Damage per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Critical Resilience
dbEquipBonuses.description: Upon taking critical damage in Wildspace, you have a 25% chance to gain -5% Incoming Damage for 5s. In non-Wildspace, gain -2.5% Incoming Damage for 5s. (10s cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Upon taking critical damage in The Reghed Edge, you have a 25% chance to gain -5% Incoming Damage for 5s. In non-The Reghed Edge, gain -2.5% Incoming Damage for 5s. (10s cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Daily Reserves
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown) Additionally, when Daily Reserves triggers, you gain 7% Forte for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Rothe's Intimidation
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged, you explode with fury, dealing 5,517 damage to enemies within 15', and generating additional threat. (10s cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 5% more damage to enemies that are not facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 5% more damage to enemies that are facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Rothe's Intimidation
dbEquipBonuses.description: Upon taking critical damage, you have a 25% chance to explode with fury, dealing damage and additional threat to enemies within 15'. You also gain -2.5% Incoming Damage for 5s. (10s cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reactive Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Deflect Severity by 15% and Forte by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reactive Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Deflect Severity by 15% and Forte by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Ruthless Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain +0.8% Accuracy and +0.6% Combat Advantage for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stack: +4% Accuracy and +3% Combat Advantage

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 500 Critical Strike for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Renegade's Footwork
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 1% Movement Speed and Recharge Speed for 10 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 5% Movement Speed and Recharge Speed

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Combat Advantage for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
dbEquipBonuses.description: Grants up to -20% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: -0% Incoming Damage. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.
